title: Сыворотка для роста волос

characteristics.Состав: Aqua, Caffeine, Niacinamide, Hydroxyethyl urea,; GLYCERIN, PEG-40 HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL,; Butylene Glycol, Dextran, Acetyl Tetrapeptide-3,; Trifolium Pratense (Clover) Flower Extract,; Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract,; Capsicum Annuum fruit extract, Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) extract,; Menthol, Panthenol, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin,; Parfum, Citric Acid.
characteristics.Действие: для роста волос; от выпадения волос
